Title: Verify User Registration
Test Data: Username: testuser, Password: testpass, Email: test@example.com
Test Steps:
1. User enters "testuser" as username, "testpass" as password, and "test@example.com" as email.
2. User clicks on "Register" button.
3. Application sends a request to the database to check if the user is registered.
4. Database checks if the user is already registered.
5. If the user is not registered, the database grants access and sends a confirmation back to the application.
6. Application redirects the user to the homepage.
Expected Result: User is registered and redirected to the homepage.

Title: Verify User Login
Test Steps:
1. User enters "testuser" as username and "testpass" as password.
2. User clicks on "Login" button.
3. Application sends a request to the database to verify the user's credentials.
4. Database checks if the user is registered and if the password matches.
5. If the credentials are correct, the database grants access and sends a confirmation back to the application.
6. Application redirects the user to the homepage.
Expected Result: User is logged in and redirected to the homepage.

Title: Verify User Login with Incorrect Password
Test Steps:
1. User enters "testuser" as username and "wrongpassword" as password.
2. User clicks on "Login" button.
3. Application sends a request to the database to verify the user's credentials.
4. Database checks if the user is registered and if the password matches.
5. If the credentials are incorrect, the database denies access and sends a failure message back to the application.
6. Application displays an error message to the user.
Expected Result: User is shown an error message indicating incorrect password.

Title: Update User Information
Test Data: New Username: newuser, New Email: newemail@example.com
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the settings page.
2. User enters "newuser" as the new username and "newemail@example.com" as the new email.
3. User clicks on "Save Changes" button.
4. Application sends a request to the database to update the user information.
5. Database updates the user information and confirms the update.
6. Application redirects the user to the homepage.
Expected Result: User information is updated and the user is redirected to the homepage.

Title: Add New Device
Test Data: Device Name: NewDevice, Device Model: ModelX, Device ID: 12345
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the device management page.
2. User enters "NewDevice" as the device name, "ModelX" as the device model, and "12345" as the device ID.
3. User selects the associated user from the dropdown list.
4. User clicks on "Add Device" button.
5. Application sends a request to the database to add the new device.
6. Database adds the new device and confirms the addition.
7. Application redirects the user to the device management page.
Expected Result: New device is added and the user is redirected to the device management page.

Title: Update Device Information
Preconditions: User is logged in and has at least one device.
Test Data: Device ID: 12345, New Device Name: UpdatedDevice, New Device Model: ModelY
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the device management page.
2. User selects the device with ID "12345".
3. User enters "UpdatedDevice" as the new device name and "ModelY" as the new device model.
4. User clicks on "Update Device" button.
5. Application sends a request to the database to update the device information.
6. Database updates the device information and confirms the update.
7. Application redirects the user to the device management page.
Expected Result: Device information is updated and the user is redirected to the device management page.

Title: Update Material Information
Preconditions: User is logged in and has at least one material.
Test Data: Material ID: 12345, New Chemical Formula: CH4, New Percentage Presence: 60, New Carbon Footprint: 15
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the material management page.
2. User selects the material with ID "12345".
3. User enters "CH4" as the new chemical formula, "60" as the new percentage presence, and "15" as the new carbon footprint.

Title: Perform Device Scan
Preconditions: User is logged in and has at least one device.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the device scan page.
2. User selects the device with ID "12345".
3. User clicks on "Start Scan" button.
4. Application sends a request to the database to perform the hardware scan.
5. Database performs the hardware scan and provides the component name and impact.
6. Application receives the scan results and returns them to the user.
7. Application also returns the component name, impact, and device diagnostics.
8. User reviews the scan results.
Expected Result: Scan results are displayed to the user, including component name, impact, and device diagnostics.
